name: multi_kernel_fusion
description: Fuse N separate CUDA kernel launches into 1 Triton kernel, eliminating N-1 intermediate HBM writes. Identify ops that PyTorch launches separately but could be one kernel.
when_to_apply: Any operation where PyTorch eager launches multiple kernels for what is logically one operation. Common in: Softsign (abs+add+div=3 kernels), HingeLoss (mul+clamp+mean), Softplus (exp+log1p+threshold).
